Pebble SDK setup, documentation, JavaScript modules, testing, tools, Waf build system, and configuration files.

## Folders
- **[defaults](defaults/README.md)**: Pebble app setup, Git ignore rules, SDK functions, watch face handling, and project file templates.
- **[docs](docs/README.md)**: Links to Pebble Developer Guides, CSS files, HTML templates, and SDK documentation.
- **[include](include/README.md)**: JavaScript modules for message handling, event management, and Pebble app initialization.
- **[tests](tests/README.md)**: JavaScript testing configuration, mock implementation, and test scripts for Pebble firmware with ESLint and Mocha.
- **[tools](tools/README.md)**: TypeScript definitions, JSON schemas, Webpack loader, license info, metadata injection, memory reports, and package management tools.
- **[waf](waf/README.md)**: Waf build system components, setup scripts, and configuration tools.
- **[waftools](waf/README.mdtools)**: Tools and functions for configuring, building, and processing Pebble SDK projects using Waf.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories for Git to ignore, including the dynamically built waf script.
- **[Doxyfile-SDK.template](Doxyfile-SDK.template.md)**: Template configuration file for Doxygen to generate documentation for the Pebble SDK project.
- **[pebble_app.ld.template](pebble_app.ld.template.md)**: Linker script template for defining memory layout and sections for Pebble applications.
- **[readme.txt](readme.txt.md)**: Instructions for building and exporting symbols in the SDK source directory.
- **[sdk_package.json](sdk_package.json.md)**: Defines metadata and dependencies for the Pebble SDK package.
- **[sdk_requirements.txt](sdk_requirements.txt.md)**: Lists Python package dependencies for the SDK, including freetype-py, sh, and pypng.
- **[update-waf.sh](update-waf.sh.md)**: Script to update the Waf build system to version 2.1.4 and remove unnecessary files for Pebble SDK.
- **[use_requirements.json](use_requirements.json.md)**: Specifies a dependency on "pebble-tool" version 4.4-beta4 or higher.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Waf script for building the Pebble SDK, including custom waf tools and SDK project file management.
